name: alloy-prototype
description: Root orchestration for alloy-prototype. Runs anvil + Rust backend + Vite web app concurrently so `bun run dev` is a single entry point.

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n anvil,backend,web -c yellow,magenta,cyan "anvil --block-time 2" "cd backend && cargo run" "cd web && bun run dev"
scripts.check: cd backend && cargo check && cd ../web && bun run typecheck
scripts.build: cd backend && cargo build && cd ../web && bun run build
scripts.install:all: bun install && cd web && bun install
